name: usb-net
description: Universal ASIX USB-Ethernet driver for PCM 3.1 / MMI3G+ / RNS-850. Supports AX88772 / 772A / 772B / 772C (and 88178 + Linksys/NetGear rebadges) by activating Harman's own AX88772B init path from later firmware. Brings up the link, gets DHCP (or static), and enables telnet. Loads from USB only — never modifies the read-only firmware.
author: dspl1236

values.label: Static 172.16.42.1 — direct cable to a PC
